## Summary

- Describe the user-visible outcome and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] TypeScript and Python typechecks pass
- [ ] Relevant frontend/backend tests pass
- [ ] Production frontend build passes

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, personal paths, private URLs, models, datasets, or logs included
- [ ] New network/filesystem/process behavior has validation and abuse tests
- [ ] User-facing privacy, billing, or migration impact is documented

## Screenshots or recordings

Include sanitized media for visible UI changes when useful.
